roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:TO SET DA MOTION TO REVOKE PROBATION/X:AS PART OF A NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION, THE PEOPLE MOVE TO TERMINATE THIS PROBATION,/MO GRTD/X:THE DEFENDANT ENTERS A HARVEY WAIVER,/X:ANY RESTITUTION RESULTING FROM THIS CASE MAY BE ADDED AS TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE SENTENCE IN COURT NO,21003315,/CTORD:PROBATION IN #20007449 IS HEREBY TERMINATED AS UNSUCCESSFUL/

/TWS/CH2:ISS:CPROB:PROB 3 Y:PJ 12D/CTS:12/VF2:150/RESTR/SA2:145 11TH ST,,SF/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/SUSFF/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/REMA/CTORD:THAT THE GPS DEVICE BE REMOVED FROM THE DEFENDANT/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:08-17-20/987,2/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIALMONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THERECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATEDPICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SAORD/SA2:145 - 11TH ST, SF/SAORD3/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/TE:1 HOUR/DOP/
/CAL:TO SET DA MOTION TO REVOKE PROBATION/DAWT/CONTD:PD BAIL MOTION ON 04-13-21 IN D9/DOP/CONTD:SETTING DA MTR ON 05-13-21 IN D20/DOP/
/CAL: TO SET HEARING ON DA MOTION TO REVOKE PROBATION/CONTD: SAME, IN DEPARTMENT 20/DOP/
